MELSubItem.Title: Left and Right System Pressure Transducers

ListItem.Para: Inoperative system pressure transducer is deactivated.
Associated system pump pressure indications operate normally.

Note.Para: Hydraulic system pressure transducers and hydraulic pump pressure transducers are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative hydraulic system pressure transducer (AMM DDG 29-31-01).

ListItem.Para: For the left hydraulic system pressure transducer:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker MEDC CH A L ENGINE and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
Gain access to the inoperative system pressure transducer.
Disconnect, cap and stow the associated transducer electrical connector.
Close circuit breaker MEDC CH A L ENGINE.

Note.Para: If left engine MEDC channel A is also inoperative, do not close circuit breaker MEDC CHAN A L ENGINE. Lock circuit breaker MEDC CHAN A L ENGINE with an INOP tag.

ListItem.Para: For the right hydraulic system pressure transducer:
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker MEDC CH A R ENGINE and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
Gain access to the inoperative system pressure transducer.
Disconnect, cap and stow the associated transducer electrical connector.
Close circuit breaker MEDC CH A R ENGINE.

Note.Para: If right engine MEDC channel A is also inoperative, do not close circuit breaker MEDC CHAN A R ENGINE. Lock circuit breaker MEDC CHAN A R ENGINE with an INOP tag.

ListItem.Para: Center system pressure transducer is deactivated.
Landing gear is secured in the down position.
Center system pump pressure indications operate normally.
Nose gear isolation system operates normally.
Airplane is dispatched in accordance with the AFM Landing Gear Extended appendix.

Note.Para: Hydraulic system pressure transducers and hydraulic pump pressure transducers are interchangeable.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative center hydraulic system pressure transducer and secure the landing gear in the down position (AMM DDG 29-31-01).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the inoperative center hydraulic system pressure transducer.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HYD PRESS SNSR-CHAN 4 and lock with a DO NOT CLOSE tag.
Gain access to the inoperative system pressure transducer.
Disconnect, cap and stow the associated transducer electrical connector.
Close circuit breaker HYD PRESS SNSR-CHAN 4.
Secure the landing gear in the down position.
Install landing gear downlock pins (dispatch tool J32011) for airplane flight with landing gear locked in the extended position.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-1
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-2
LG LEVER LOCK
On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set the Overspeed Warning switch to GEAR DOWN.
The airplane must be dispatched using the AFM Landing Gear Extended appendix.
Determine flight planning information by selecting Gear Down Dispatch in the Boeing performance software.

Note.Para: The FMC does not support certain provisions for operations with the landing gear extended.

ListItem.Para: VMO GEAR DOWN memo message will be displayed.
